summary: Frontend-only Expo/React Native mobile app tested via web preview at mobile viewport (375x667). All 10 screens + QR modal render. Splash auto-navigates to Login after ~2.2s, Login form accepts inputs and navigates to (tabs)/home, Home Dashboard shows student header, 87% attendance stat, Blue belt, Fees Due card (Rs 4,800), Today's Class with trainer, 12 quick-access cards grid, Featured Event banner with 21-day countdown. Bottom tab bar with central Scan FAB is visible; FAB opens /qr-scan modal with animated laser and transitions to success state (Class: Karate Drills) after ~2.8s with a working Done button that dismisses the modal. Auxiliary routes /attendance, /progress, /events all load correctly (87% ring, Feb 2026 calendar, fitness score 82/100, belt journey, Upcoming/Registered/Certificates tabs). Navigation via home quick-access cards confirmed. Only non-blocking console warnings observed (shadow*, useNativeDriver, TouchableWithoutFeedback, pointerEvents deprecations) — all expected per agent-to-agent context note.

issues: TouchableWithoutFeedback used for dismissing keyboard is deprecated — consider Pressable (non-blocking)

react_native_issues.issue: shadow* style props are deprecated on react-native-web; migrate to boxShadow when convenient. Non-blocking per spec.
useNativeDriver:true triggers warning on web (RCTAnimation missing). Non-blocking; animations fall back to JS-based.

action_items: None blocking. Optional: migrate shadow* -> boxShadow, TouchableWithoutFeedback -> Pressable, and pointerEvents prop -> style.pointerEvents to silence RN-Web deprecation warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: home.tsx Today's Class hardcodes Mon (schedule.find(d => d.day === 'Mon')). Consider using current day dynamically.
qr-scan.tsx uses fixed 2.8s timeout to simulate scan success — acceptable for prototype but document as mock behavior.
login.tsx onLogin does not validate credential format; acceptable for mock-only prototype per spec.
seed_data_creation: None — all data statically seeded in /app/frontend/src/mockData.ts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile-first Expo app, viewport 375x667. Test URL: https://training-portal-126.preview.emergentagent.com. Splash auto-navigates in 2.2s, QR success fires at 2.8s — use waits of ~3-4s. Bottom tab labels (Training/Schedule/Payments/Profile) also appear as text elsewhere on pages; use testIDs or .nth(-1)/role=button when clicking tab bar to avoid Playwright strict-mode violations. Direct deep-link navigation to /attendance, /progress, /events works. testID coverage is good: splash-screen, login-tab-student/parent, login-id-input, login-password-input, login-submit-button, home-student-name, home-due-card, home-event-banner, home-notification-btn, quick-top-*, quick-card-* (12 cards), fab-qr-scan, qr-close, qr-done.
rca_of_issue: No critical bugs found. Earlier blank screenshot of /attendance during in-app navigation was a transient rendering/timing artifact; direct reload of /attendance renders the screen fully (87% ring, Feb 2026 calendar grid with present/missed/off states, QR Check In CTA, missed history list).
